confirm.deleteMessage: Delete {{name}}? Imported schema and permission settings will also be deleted (audit logs are kept).
confirm.importMessage: Replace the imported structure with the current structure of the target database. Permission entries are kept. Continue?

permissions.notImported: Schema is not imported yet. Import it from the connection page first

orphan.title: Entries without target
orphan.description: These entries reference objects that no longer exist in the imported schema (they become effective again if re-import restores the target). Remove them if no longer needed.

confirm.importMessage: All existing permission settings of this connection will be deleted and replaced by the YAML content. Continue?
